texto: This is just another reason for these “women” (and I use the term loosely) to be gross and obscene and call it a “political statement.” It’s not helpful. If anything, it’s demeaning and insulting to women who think with more than our genitals and who are concerned with issues bigger than our ladyparts. But by all means, keep acting the fool. All you’re doing is exposing yourselves for what you really are. The rest of us want no part of your nonsense.
explicacao: Citação de Chrissie Johnson sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “This is just another reason for these “women” (and I use the term loosely) to be gross and obscen…” articula reflexao, anti-feminism, anti-feminist em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como anti-feminist e bodyparts.
